reportTypes.title: Report categories to scrape
reportTypes.description: Each entry maps to a tab on core.spglobal.com/#platts/rptsSearch.

excludeReportNames.title: Substrings to exclude (case-insensitive)
excludeReportNames.description: Skip rows whose Report Name contains any of these substrings. Used to drop translated duplicates.

maxReportsPerType.title: Max reports per category
maxReportsPerType.description: Upper bound of rows processed per report-type grid (safety cap).

dryRun.title: Dry run (no upload, no Telegram)
dryRun.description: If true, extracts and captures PDFs but skips Supabase upload and Telegram notification.

forceRedownload.title: Ignore dedup, re-download everything
forceRedownload.description: If true, ignores existing records in Supabase and re-processes every row.

telegramChatId.title: Telegram chat ID (overrides env)
telegramChatId.description: Optional. If empty, uses TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID env.
